Hero.title: Securing Structures with Passive Fire Protection
Hero.subtitle: Leading solutions in fire stopping and passive fire protection systems for over 30 years.

About.title: About Uzman Yapı
About.history: For over 30 years in Turkey and around the world, Uzman Yapı has been providing leader solutions in fire stopping and passive fire protection systems.
About.vision: We elevate building safety to the highest level with our internationally certified (UL, FM, Intertek) products in the field of steel structure fire insulation, structural joint elements, and fire-resistant coatings.

Projects.desc: Explore our portfolio of successful implementations across various sectors.
